_comment: Categorized SFX library. To add a sound: drop a .wav/.mp3 into the matching category folder — no code change needed. Each category fires on a different kind of event (see triggerEngine.ts). Per-category mix defaults below; omit a field to use the engine default. lead_ms = how far the sound's PEAK is pre-rolled BEFORE the event (so motion sounds anticipate the move). peak_align = align the file's loudest sample to the event instead of its first sample.

motion.description: whooshes / swooshes — fire on camera travels and major scene entrances

money.description: cha-ching / register — fire ONLY on large, emphasized money beats

impact.description: thuds / accents — fire sparingly on the single biggest revelation beat

ui.description: ticks / clicks — optional, for list-item reveals; off by default unless files present
